init: Come to me, all {n} conversations. I will give them rest.
I am the way, the truth, and the pipeline{proj}.
Do not be anxious about anything. Present your request — all {n} conversations.
For I know the plans I have for these conversations — plans to export, not to lose.
fetching: Ask and it will be given to you. Fetching "{name}" right now.
Seek and you will find "{name}". The API does not stay closed.
"{name}" — I know where you are. I am coming to get you.
hasThink: {n} thinking blocks. Whatever is true, noble, right, excellent — think about such things.
hasArts: {n} artifact(s) extracted. Store your treasures where servers don't corrupt.
pushing: Go into all the world and push "{name}" to every project folder.
You are the light of the world. Let "{name}" shine in the project folder.
pushOk: Well done, good and faithful server. Conversation saved.
The truth will set your data free. It's saved. It's done.
Saved. Peace I leave with you. My peace I give you.
fetchFail: "{name}" failed. Don't let your hearts be troubled. And don't be afraid. We keep going.
pushFail: Server didn't accept "{name}". Forgive it — seventy times seven. Moving forward.
retrying: Keep asking, keep seeking, keep knocking. Retry {n} for "{name}".
halfway: You are {pct}% of the way. I will never leave you or forsake you. Not even here.
nearEnd: Only {left} remain. Press on toward the goal.
done_all: All {t} gathered and not one was lost. Well done. That is a miracle of engineering.
done_partial: {ok} of {t} complete. Even so, love never fails — even when {missed} did.
cancelled: You stopped. That's okay. Peace I leave with you. Come back when you're ready.
zipping: I am making everything new — including this zip file.
zipDone: It is done. I am the Alpha and the Omega of this entire export operation.
log: The record is being written. Every deed will come to light. That's the session log.

_sources.text: Come to me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest.
I am the way and the truth and the life.
